task: I’m getting ready to do a full DIY front and rear brake job on my 2020 Chevrolet Traverse with the 3.6L V6, so could you use RockAuto to look up OEM-style front and rear brake pad and rotor kits for that exact vehicle and jot down the key details like brand, part line, what each kit includes, and anything that helps me tell the options apart? If there are separate front and rear kits, open the actual product pages or info popups so I can visually compare them, and leave the most relevant RockAuto results open in their own tabs. Once you’ve got the parts figured out, go to the Haynes US site and find the repair manual that would actually help with brake pad and rotor replacement for this Traverse, and grab the manual title, link, and coverage years so I know it matches my SUV. Then check Amazon for a hose clamp tightening tool that looks suitable to keep nearby for the job, give me one solid option with its current price, and open the product page so I can see the photos and reviews for myself. In the end, send me a short summary with the RockAuto brake kit details, the Haynes manual name and link, and the Amazon tool name and price.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to RockAuto, correctly identified the 2020 Chevrolet Traverse 3.6L V6, and accessed the "Rotor & Brake Pad Kit" category. It extracted multiple options (Power Stop CRK series, KOE series, and Dynamic Friction kits), noted key differences (coated vs. non-coated, front/rear/full kits), and opened specific product info pages (e.g., CRK7411, CRK7409) to verify details. The agent also correctly identified and documented the fitment complexities (VIN/caliper markings) inherent to this vehicle's brake parts.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to the RockAuto catalog for the 2020 Chevrolet Traverse brake kits. It opened multiple tabs (tabs 2, 3, 4, and 5) containing the main catalog page and specific "More Information" pop-up pages for the Power Stop CRK7411 (rear), CRK7409 (front), and CRK7410 (full kit) options. These tabs remained open throughout the session, allowing for the requested visual comparison of the different kit options.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Haynes US website and located the specific repair manual for the 2020 Chevrolet Traverse. The agent confirmed the manual title ("Chevrolet Traverse from 2018 to 2024 Service & Repair Manual"), the link (https://us.haynes.com/products/haynes-diy-chevrolet-traverse-from-2018-to-2024), and the coverage years (2018-2024), which includes the 2020 model year. The manual page was opened and verified during the session.

R4: success - The agent successfully searched for a "hose clamp tightening tool" on Amazon, identified a suitable product ("Powerbuilt Flexible Hose Clamp Driver"), and opened the product page (tabs[7]). The agent also verified the price ($12.99) and included this information in the final summary. The verification requirement is met as the product page was open and the tool name and price were recorded.

R5: success - The agent provided a summary that includes:
1. RockAuto brake kit details (Brand, part line, what each kit includes, and price).
2. Haynes manual name, link, and coverage years (2018-2024).
3. Amazon tool name (Powerbuilt Flexible Hose Clamp Driver) and price ($12.99).

The summary is combined and covers all required elements. The agent successfully navigated to the relevant pages and extracted the necessary information to populate the summary.
